_comment: Player profiles. Each profile links a display name to a save slot and a settings snapshot. Managed by js/settings.js — do not hand-edit while the game is running.

_schema.displayName: Human-readable profile name shown in the UI
_schema.saveSlot: Matches a key in ironcompany_saves localStorage index, or null
_schema.settings: Per-profile settings overrides — merged on top of settings.json defaults
